# Claude Email Marketing Skill

Claude Email Marketing Skill is a skill package for Claude-assisted positioning, segmentation, and lifecycle content.

Install:

```bash
npx skills add claudeemailmarketing
```

## Primary agent resources

- Markdown index: https://claudeemailmarketing.com/index.md
- Skill page: https://claudeemailmarketing.com/skill/index.md
- Raw SKILL.md: https://claudeemailmarketing.com/skills/claudeemailmarketing/SKILL.md
- Skill discovery JSON: https://claudeemailmarketing.com/.well-known/skills/index.json

## Articles

- How to Build an Agent-Ready Claude Email Marketing Strategy: https://claudeemailmarketing.com/articles/agent-ready-email-strategy/index.md
- The Practical Claude Email Marketing Operations Playbook for AI Agents: https://claudeemailmarketing.com/articles/email-operations-playbook/index.md
- Claude Email Marketing Skill Audit Checklist: From Prompt to Production: https://claudeemailmarketing.com/articles/email-skill-audit-checklist/index.md
